description:
The local web page at /home/ga/Documents/Research/Apollo_11_Report.html contains a historical report, but it is obscured by massive DOM overlays (an ad and a cookie banner) and a hostile '@media print' CSS block that hides the content and displays a warning when printed.

Your task:
1. Open Firefox Developer Tools.
2. Delete the DOM nodes containing the ad overlay ('overlay-ad') and the cookie banner ('cookie-banner').
3. Disable or delete the hostile '@media print' CSS block so the article content is visible during printing.
4. Print the cleaned page to a PDF file.
5. Save the PDF exactly to: /home/ga/Documents/Research/Clean_Apollo_Report.pdf
